quas sit et nihil exercitationem at cumque ullam

testcase.name: shouldGetPostsInformation
shouldNotGetPostsById
shouldNotGetPostsCommentsInformationAsNull
shouldNotPutInRecordById
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: shouldPostNewRecord
testcase.system-out:
